codeReview.summary: All changes are documentation-only (AUDIT markers and comment updates). No logic changes, no new code paths. Independently verified: (1) paging.rs AUDIT comment correctly states 0 unsafe blocks; ARMv8 descriptor bits and address space layout are reasonable. (2) memory_mapped_io.rs AUDIT comment correctly states 3 unsafe blocks; all 3 have accurate SAFETY comments, alignment guarded by debug_assert, volatile access pattern is sound. (3) main.rs AUDIT comment updated from 19→24; grep -c confirms 24 unsafe blocks. Category breakdown independently verified: 4 linker symbol + 5 Fix 17 context reads + 8 volatile reads + 1 volatile write + 1 dsb barrier + 2 wfe hints + 1 mrs block + 1 from_raw_parts + 1 from_utf8_unchecked = 24. Fix 17's 5 blocks in validate_context_before_eret use addr_of!/read_volatile correctly to avoid aliasing UB, execute only in validation/error paths, have SAFETY comments. All expectedBehavior items satisfied.

issues.description: AUDIT comment says 'regions contiguous, no gaps or overlaps' but the user VA layout has intentional unmapped gaps (e.g., USER_CODE_BASE 0x40_0000 to HEAP_BASE 0x100_0000, USER_STACK_TOP 0x8000_0000 to SHARED_MEMORY_BASE 0xC000_0000). Adjacent defined regions do abut correctly (HEAP_END==DMA_BUFFER_BASE, DMA_BUFFER_END==DEVICE_MMIO_BASE, etc.), so the intent is clear and the audit conclusion (no bugs) is correct. The wording could be more precise but this is cosmetic.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md 'Post-Audit Additions' section says 'main.rs has 5 unsafe blocks added by Fix 17... AUDIT comment says 19 but file has 24. Needs update in M4.' This feature resolved that gap — the AUDIT comment now says 24. The AGENTS.md section is now stale and could be removed or marked resolved to avoid confusing future workers.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md line 'main.rs has 5 unsafe blocks added by Fix 17 (TPIDR race). AUDIT comment says 19 but file has 24. Needs update in M4.' vs. main.rs line 1: '// AUDIT: 2026-03-14 — All 24 unsafe blocks enumerated and verified.'

summary: Clean pass. This is a documentation-only audit: AUDIT markers added to paging.rs (0 unsafe) and memory_mapped_io.rs (3 unsafe), main.rs AUDIT comment updated 19→24 with accurate categorization including Fix 17's 5 blocks. All counts independently verified. No bugs found, no code changes, 1006 tests pass, kernel builds. One non-blocking cosmetic observation about paging.rs region contiguity wording. One shared-state observation: AGENTS.md has a now-resolved note about the 19→24 discrepancy that could be cleaned up.
